scripts.build-front: cd src/front && npm install --include=dev && npm run build
scripts.test-api-local: npx newman run tests/api/api-test-exportations-stats.json -e tests/api/api-test-env-local.json && npx newman run tests/api/api-test-conflict-stats.json -e tests/api/api-test-env-local.json && npx newman run tests/api/api-test-military-stats.json -e tests/api/api-test-env-local.json
scripts.test-api-online: npx newman run tests/api/api-test-exportations-stats.json -e tests/api/api-test-env-render.json && npx newman run tests/api/api-test-conflict-stats.json -e tests/api/api-test-env-render.json && npx newman run tests/api/api-test-military-stats.json -e tests/api/api-test-env-render.json
